original: It seems like no matter where you go in the galaxy, someone, somewhere is clad head to toe in latex. This offering from GabMart Threadz hopes to continue that proud tradition. Self-cleaning, never-smudge latex promises to hug and accentuate every curve, while next-generation elastic polymer reinforcement allows it to repel small blades and low caliber ammunition with ease. And who could forget the timelessly alluring tiger stripe pattern that Terrans love so much? Certainly not GabMart Threadz!
